2603.17834.title: Generative Control as Optimization: Time Unconditional Flow Matching for Adaptive and Robust Robotic Control
2603.17834.paper_summary: Diffusion models and flow matching have become a cornerstone of robotic imitation learning, yet they suffer from a structural inefficiency where inference is often bound to a fixed integration schedule that is agnostic to state complexity. This paradigm forces the policy to expend the same computational budget on trivial motions as it does on complex tasks. We introduce Generative Control as Optimization (GeCO), a time-unconditional framework that transforms action synthesis from trajectory integration into iterative optimization. GeCO learns a stationary velocity field in the action-sequence space where expert behaviors form stable attractors. Consequently, test-time inference becomes an adaptive process that allocates computation based on convergence--exiting early for simple states while refining longer for difficult ones. Furthermore, this stationary geometry yields an intrinsic, training-free safety signal, as the field norm at the optimized action serves as a robust out-of-distribution (OOD) detector, remaining low for in-distribution states while significantly increasing for anomalies. We validate GeCO on standard simulation benchmarks and demonstrate seamless scaling to pi0-series Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models. As a plug-and-play replacement for standard flow-matching heads, GeCO improves success rates and efficiency with an optimization-native mechanism for safe deployment. Video and code can be found at https://hrh6666.github.io/GeCO/
2603.17834.paper_summary_zh: 擴散模型和流匹配已成為機器人模仿學習的基石，然而它們存在結構上的低效率，因為推理往往受限於固定的整合時間表，對狀態複雜性無法適應。這種範式迫使策略在微不足道的動作上消耗與在複雜任務上一樣的計算預算。我們引入了生成控制作為優化（GeCO），這是一個時間無關的框架，將動作合成從軌跡整合轉變為迭代優化。GeCO在動作序列空間中學習一個穩定的速度場，其中專家行為形成穩定的吸引子。因此，測試時的推理成為一個自適應過程，根據收斂分配計算——對於簡單狀態提前退出，而對於困難狀態則進行更長時間的精煉。此外，這種靜態幾何結構產生了一個內在的、無需訓練的安全信號，因為在優化動作下的場範數作為一個穩健的分佈外（OOD）檢測器，對於分佈內狀態保持低值，而對於異常則顯著增加。我們在標準模擬基準上驗證了GeCO，並展示了其無縫擴展到pi0系列的視覺-語言-行動（VLA）模型。作為標準流匹配頭的即插即用替代品，GeCO通過一個原生優化機制提高了成功率和效率，以實現安全部署。視頻和代碼可以在 https://hrh6666.github.io/GeCO/ 找到。
2603.17834.author: Zunzhe Zhang et.al.
2603.17834.authors: Zunzhe Zhang, Runhan Huang, Yicheng Liu, Shaoting Zhu, Linzhan Mou, Hang Zhao
